lyrics.text: I’ve been painting every fence I know
lyrics.translation: 我涂画出我所知的每一处险阻

lyrics.text: Every color bleeds into the same
lyrics.translation: 层叠的颜色或许已经模糊

lyrics.text: Cause before you go and walk away
Yeah, you'd better know where you’re going
lyrics.translation: 你最好知道你要去往何处

lyrics.text: Hey ya, hey ya
You’re a wanderer just like me
lyrics.translation: 你就像我一样是个流浪者

lyrics.text: Hey ya, hey ya
Yeah, you'd better know where you’re going
lyrics.translation: 你最好知道哪里是你的归宿
